info.name: Microsoft Azure NetworkGroup
info.description: The Microsoft Azure Network Group API provides a RESTful set of web services that interact with Microsoft Azure Network Manager service to manage your network resources.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Networkmanagers Networkmanagername Networkgroups Networkgroupname Listeffectivevirtualnetworks

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the network manager.
(Required) The name of the network group.

request.description: Lists all effective virtual networks by specified network group.

response.name: OK - Returns information about the effective virtual networks.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Networkmanagers Networkmanagername Networkgroups Networkgroupname

query.description: Deletes the resource even if it is part of a deployed configuration. If the configuration has been deployed, the service will do a cleanup deployment in the background, prior to the delete.
